headline: Charles Schwab Board Shift Sparks Fresh Look At Valuation And Returns
summary: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) has proposed declassifying its Board of Directors, moving to annual elections for all directors. The proposal is scheduled for a shareholder vote at the upcoming Annual Meeting. This change would shift Schwab away from a staggered board structure toward more regular accountability to shareholders. For investors watching NYSE:SCHW, the governance proposal arrives with the stock at a recent close of $94.8. Shares show a 24.7% return over the past year and a 95.1%...
